seasons.details: While the boys are waiting for the school bus, Cartman explains the odd nightmare he had the previous night involving alien visitors.
seasons.title: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe

seasons.details: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.
seasons.title: Weight Gain 4000

seasons.details: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.
seasons.title: Volcano

seasons.details: When Stan discovers his new dog Sparky is gay, he becomes so confused he loses his will to play in the big Homecoming Football game against North Park.
seasons.title: Big Gay Al's Gay Boat Ride

seasons.details: Kyle's mom won't let him keep his new pet, an elephant because it's so huge. So the boys turn turn to the Dr. Mephesto to genetically engineer a smaller elephant.
seasons.title: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig

seasons.details: Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favorite TV show, "Terrance and Phillip."
seasons.title: Death

seasons.details: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.
seasons.title: Pinkeye

seasons.details: Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.
seasons.title: Starvin' Marvin

seasons.details: While South Park Elementary is attempting to stage a non-denominational holiday play that won't offend (or entertain) anyone, Kyle checks himself into the South Park mental asylum.
seasons.title: Mr. Hankey, the Christmas Poo

seasons.details: After being shunned by the others kids, Damien, the Son of Satan, calls upon his father to fight Jesus in the ultimate Pay-Per-View Boxing Match between good and evil.
seasons.title: Damien

seasons.details: O senhor Garrison faz uma cirurgia plástica no nariz e abandona a escola para ser modelo. Os rapazes se apaixonam por Ellen, a nova professora substituta, causando ciúmes em Wendy.
seasons.title: A rinoplastia de Tom

seasons.details: Os rapazes encontram um objeto misterioso em uma escavação escolar e saem no jornal. Barbra Streisand aparece na cidade buscando o tal objeto, pois é a última peça necessária para que ela possa se transformar em um monstro japonês gigante.
seasons.title: Meca-Streisand

seasons.details: Cartman quer descobrir quem é o seu pai, entretanto, não será uma tarefa nada fácil, já que sua mãe dormiu com muitos homens.
seasons.title: A Mãe do Cartman É uma Vaca

seasons.details: Terrance and Phillip must save Terrance's Little Daughter, Sally, and all of Canada from an evil dictator.
seasons.title: Terrance and Phillip in Not Without My Anus

seasons.details: The boys wait for Dr. Mephesto to regain consciousness and reveal the identity of Cartman's father.
seasons.title: Cartman's Mom is Still a Dirty Slut

seasons.details: Mr. Mackey, the school counselor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.
seasons.title: Ike's Wee Wee

seasons.details: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.
seasons.title: Chickenlover

seasons.details: With Pip as their star player, the South Park dodgeball team is off to the championships.
seasons.title: Conjoined Fetus Lady

seasons.details: Jimbo and Ned's efforts to drive up the ratings for their new hunting show on the cable access channel threatens to edge out an old favorite, "Jesus and Pals."
seasons.title: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka

seasons.details: A freak accident leaves the South Park Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff.
seasons.title: City on the Edge of Forever

seasons.details: The entire town is gearing up for the annual 4th of July celebration when a ban on fireworks is imposed.
seasons.title: Summer Sucks

seasons.details: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town.
seasons.title: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls

seasons.details: The kids' parents only have their best interests at heart when they arrange for Stan, Kyle and Cartman to be exposed to the chickenpox virus.
seasons.title: Chickenpox

seasons.details: Os rapazes estão em um dia de passeio pelo planetário e um dos funcionários lava o cérebro deles com efeitos visuais para que eles queiram voltar para lá.
seasons.title: Roger Ebert deveria demitir os alimentos gordurosos

seasons.details: Wendy convence Stan de construir uma casa clube para poder jogar "verdade ou desafio" com ela, Kyle e Bebe. Como Stan está afim de pegar ela, começa a construir o tal clube.
seasons.title: Clubes

seasons.details: South Park está em festa! É o "Dia das Vacas", e os cidadãos podem passear pela feira, conferir um monumento e a grande corrida das vacas. Enquanto isso, os rapazes fazem de tudo para ganhar uns bonecos de Terrance e Philip.
seasons.title: Festival da Vaca

seasons.details: O Chef está sendo processado por tentar obter os direitos autorais de uma canção que escreveu há 20 anos atrás. Para ajudá-lo nesta batalha, os garotos organizam um concerto para arrecadar dinheiro.
seasons.title: Ajuda ao Chef

seasons.details: A tia Flo está de visita e dá um presente para Stan: um peixe medonho. Com o tempo, começam a aparecer alguns cadáveres por aí, e a mãe de Stan tenta fingir que não tem nada a ver.
seasons.title: Peixe assustador

seasons.details: Stan foge de casa e vai à Nebraska. Os rapazes querem ver o senhor Hanckey na noite de Natal. E o tio de Cartman e Charles Manson escapam da prisão e se escondem no porão dos Cartman.
seasons.title: Feliz Natal, Charlie Mason

seasons.details: Os rapazes são obrigados a escreverem textos sobre pequenas empresas para que o senhor Garrison não perca o seu trabalho como professor. Os meninos se juntam com Tweek, que sugere um novo tema para a redação: "Gnomos que roubam cuecas".
seasons.title: Gnomos

seasons.details: Stan e kyle descobrem um homem que estava preso no gelo há mais de três anos, mas acabam brigando para ver quem o descobriu e qual nome dar para ele.
seasons.title: O homem de gelo pré-histórico

seasons.details: The boys travel to the Costa Rica as a part of the "Getting Gay with Kids" choir tour.
seasons.title: Rainforest Shmainforest

seasons.details: When the citizens of South Park start exploding randomly, the mayor enlists Stan's dad, the resident geologist, to find a solution to the problem.
seasons.title: Spontaneous Combustion

seasons.details: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding.
seasons.title: Succubus

seasons.details: The boys discover a prehistoric creature called a Jackovasaur while camping at Stark's Pond.
seasons.title: Jakovasaurs

seasons.details: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.
seasons.title: Tweek Vs. Craig

seasons.details: After Sexual Harassment Panda "educates" the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.
seasons.title: Sexual Harassment Panda

seasons.details: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelley Marsh is left babysit Cartman.
seasons.title: Cat Orgy

seasons.details: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.
seasons.title: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub

seasons.details: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids.
seasons.title: Jewbilee

seasons.details: Korn comes to South Park for a Halloween concert and helps the boys solve a spooky pirate ghost mystery.
seasons.title: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery

seasons.details: Os rapazes estão viciados em "Chinpokomon" (uma paródia de Pokémon) e querem comprar os bonecos, os jogos e qualquer outra coisa relacionada com eles.
seasons.title: Chinpokomon

seasons.details: A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas.
seasons.title: Viciado em fonética de macaco

seasons.details: Um garoto encontra uma nave espacial e a usa para escapar de um ritual critão na Etiópia, e buscar um novo lugar para ele e seu povo.
seasons.title: Marvin Faminto no espaço sideral!

seasons.details: Durante uma recreação sobre a guerra civil americana, Cartman lidera o exército dos Confederados para atacar os guerreiros da União do outro lado da América. Tudo isso para poder ganhar uma aposta de Kyle e Stan.
seasons.title: Distintivo vermelho de boiolice

seasons.details: O senhor Hanckey apresenta dez musicais baseados em canções clássicas de Natal, cantadas por Kyle, Cartman, Stan, Kenny e todos os demais habitantes de South Park em seu próprio especial de Natal. Inclui os hits "Noite Feliz" e muito mais!
seasons.title: Os clássicos de Natal do Senhor Hankey

seasons.details: Cartman e Kenny acham que estão menstruando, mas na realidade, estão com uma infecção. Agora, Kyle e Stan também querem menstruar. Enquanto isso, se aproxima o novo milênio e os habitantes exigem que Jesus apresente Deus para eles.
seasons.title: Você está aí, Deus? Sou eu, Jesus

seasons.details: Os rapazes viajam para Arkansas para participar de um concerto de flauta doce e Cartman tenta tocar "ruído marrom", uma nota que faz com que as pessoas caguem nas calças.
seasons.title: Concerto ao redor do mundo

seasons.details: When Cartman discovers the Tooth Fairy is paying a premium price for his lost teeth, he and the boys seize the opportunity to make some cash.
seasons.title: Tooth Fairy's Tats 2000

seasons.details: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime and lands in juvenile hall.
seasons.title: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000

seasons.details: When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary.
seasons.title: Timmy 2000

seasons.details: 8-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.
seasons.title: Quintuplets 2000

seasons.details: Cartman decides to seek friendship using the Internet, and finds an older man who is more than willing to be his friend...and more.
seasons.title: Cartman Joins NAMBLA

seasons.details: Kyle needs a kidney transplant and Cartman is discovered to be the perfect donor. Cartman gladly offers his kidney to Kyle -- for the price of $10 million dollars.
seasons.title: Cherokee Hair Tampons

seasons.details: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.
seasons.title: Chef Goes Nanners

seasons.details: "Fingerbang" is the newest boy band starring all the boys and it's also Cartman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.
seasons.title: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

seasons.details: The boys learn in Sunday school that they must confess their sins, but worry about Timmy since all he can say is his own name.
seasons.title: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell?

seasons.details: Cartman's flock begins to grow and the children begin plans to build him a Church. Meanwhile, Satan turns to God for advice.
seasons.title: Probably

seasons.details: É o primeiro dia dos rapazes no quarto ano e eles não gostaram nada de sua nova professora. Então, eles pedem ajuda aos vizinhos de Kyle para transformar a cadeira de rodas de Timmy em uma máquina do tempo.
seasons.title: Quarto ano

seasons.details: Cartman ensina aos rapazes sueu novo fichário ultra moderno da Trapper Keeper, e melhor que o de Kyle. Mais tarde, no ônibus, um homem supostamente chamado Bill Cosby mostra um enorme interesse pelo tal fichário.
seasons.title: O fichário

seasons.details: Os alunos do quarto ano estão participando da peça "Hellen Keller, a milagrosa". O único objetivo deles é conseguir ir um pouco melhor que os alunos do jardim de infância, que segundo Butters, preparam um  show espetacular.
seasons.title: Hellen Keller! O musical!

seasons.details: Conto Southparkineiro de um livro de Dickens, tendo como narrador o britânico Malcolm McDowell, e como protagonista, Pip, um menino inglês pobre, que sonha em se transformar em um cavalheiro para conquistar a garota dos seus sonhos.
seasons.title: Pip

seasons.details: Todos acham que Cartman está muito gordo e decidem enviá-lo a um "Acampamento de Gordos" para perder peso. Por outro lado, Kenny está topando fazer qualquer coisa por dinheiro, e isso o leva às mais diversas insanidades.
seasons.title: Acampamento para gordos

seasons.details: Kyle que ir a um concerto, mas seus pais não deixam. Cartman sugere que ele vá à polícia e diga que seus pais o molestaram, para que assim eles sejam presos.
seasons.title: A estranha aventura de molestamento

seasons.details: Os rapazes estão tristes pois o senhor Hanckey anda bastante ocupado com sua família e não consegue compartilhar seu espírito natalino pela cidade. Então eles  tem uma ideia para reviver o espírito natalino na cidade.
seasons.title: Um Natal muito ruim

seasons.details: The you-know-what hits the fan 162 times when the citizens of South Park tune in to hear the word "shit" on a popular TV show.
seasons.title: It Hits The Fan

seasons.details: Big Gay Al returns to South Park as the new scout leader. When he is fired for being gay, the boys rally to his defense with the help of the new "handi-capable" kid, Jimmy.
seasons.title: Cripple Fight!

seasons.details: A magician performs in South Park, convincing Kenny, Cartman and Kyle to join his cult-like following, leaving Stan & Jesus to save them.
seasons.title: Super Best Friends

seasons.details: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.
seasons.title: Scott Tenorman Must Die

seasons.details: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland!
seasons.title: Cartmanland

seasons.details: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.
seasons.title: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow

seasons.details: In a time-honored tradition and right-of-passage, the boys are separated from the girls and schooled in the mysteries of sex by none other than Mr. Mackey.
seasons.title: Proper Condom Use

seasons.details: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back.
seasons.title: Towelie

seasons.details: The kids of South Park have raised money to send to the children of Afghanistan, but the Government believes the Afghani children's thank you gift is contaminated with Anthrax and the boys are forced to take it back to Afghanistan.
seasons.title: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants

seasons.details: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every "missing child" milk carton in the country.
seasons.title: How to Eat with Your Butt

seasons.details: O primo do Kyle, que também se chama Kyle, veio de Connecticut para visitar sua mãe em South Park. Porém, apesar da mesma idade, os primos não tem nada em comum.
seasons.title: A Entidade

seasons.details: Tolkien está triste pois os demais meninos da escola tiram sarro que sua família é rica e não tem nada a ver com South Park.
seasons.title: Vizinhança nova

seasons.details: Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. Em seguida, ele decide entrar para um novo negócio supostamente lucrativo: a venda de fetos mortos.
seasons.title: Kenny morre

seasons.details: É um episódio de South Park especial dedicado ao Butters para encerrar a temporada. A mãe de Butters descobre que seu esposo está visitando lugares gays e então, quer se suicidar e matar o Butters.
seasons.title: O próprio episódio do Butters

seasons.details: As the country becomes obsessed with a popular program for losing weight, the boys see an opportunity to become sponsored by a major restaurant chain.
seasons.title: Jared Has Aides

seasons.details: While the adults trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain.
seasons.title: Asspen

seasons.details: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.
seasons.title: Freak Strike

seasons.details: Stan is appalled when he realizes the veal he's been eating is, in fact, the meat from little baby calves.
seasons.title: Fun With Veal

seasons.details: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.
seasons.title: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer

seasons.details: The boys fire Butters as their new friend. Devastation over his rejection unleashes Butters' dark side and Professor Chaos is born.
seasons.title: Professor Chaos

seasons.details: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by "The Simpsons."
seasons.title: The Simpsons Already Did It

seasons.details: A sexual abuse scandal involving priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.
seasons.title: Red Hot Catholic Love

seasons.details: When the boys find out that their favorite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to "Save Films from their Directors."
seasons.title: Free Hat

seasons.details: Cartman gets kicked out of the gang when Bebe develops boobs and the boys lose their minds, threatening their friendships and society as we know it.
seasons.title: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society

seasons.details: Após as notícias sobre sequestros de crianças, os pais de South Park ficam preocupados e decidem contratar o proprietário e gerente do City Wok local para que construa uma grande muralha ao redor da cidade.
seasons.title: Sequestro de criança não é engraçado

seasons.details: Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer.
seasons.title: Uma escada para o céu

seasons.details: Os meninos estão tentando recuperar um vídeo pornô que seus pais deram para eles sem querer ao confundirem as fitas. Porém, no caminho de volta, eles precisam escapar dos rapazes mais velhos e... de Butters.
seasons.title: O retorno da Sociedade dos Anéis para as Duas Torres

seasons.details: O senhor Garrison é contratado como professor da quarta série, e ao ficar sabendo que pode processar a escola e ganhar muito dinheiro (caso o mandem embora em função de sua orientação sexual), faz de tudo para que isso aconteça.
seasons.title: O Campo da Morte da Tolerância

seasons.details: Cartman está em estado grave após ter comido as cinzas de Kenny há um mês atrás e agora, sua mãe, Kyle, Stan e Chef o levam para Nova Iorque, para ir ao programa do famoso espírita John Edwards.
seasons.title: A maior ducha do universo

seasons.details: Stan fuma uns cigarros de maconha que uns rapazes mais velhos deixaram e, pela noite, aparece um homem de 32 anos perdido e drogado que diz ser o Stan do futuro.
seasons.title: Meu futuro eu

seasons.details: Ao fazer o "balanço" do ano, Cartman descobre que está na lista dos "meninos maus" e que a única maneira de conseguir receber um presente do Papai Noel esse ano, seria fazendo um enorme gesto de bondade.
seasons.title: O trenó vermelho

seasons.details: Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny find out that planet Earth is just one big intergalactic reality show and it's about to be cancelled.
seasons.title: Cancelled

seasons.details: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."
seasons.title: Krazy Kripples

seasons.details: Cartman convinces the boys to "toilet paper" their teacher's house, but Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt.
seasons.title: Toilet Paper

seasons.details: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day.
seasons.title: I'm a Little Bit Country

seasons.details: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.
seasons.title: Fat Butt and Pancake Head

seasons.details: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the police department recognizes the boys' efforts and officially names them "junior deputies."
seasons.title: Lil' Crime Stoppers

seasons.details: The citizens of South Park are being forced off their land to make way for a new super highway after owners of the Three Feathers Indian Casino acquire the town.
seasons.title: Red Man's Greed

seasons.details: The town of South Park celebrates the new, hip metro-sexual craze.
seasons.title: South Park Is Gay

seasons.details: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.
seasons.title: Christian Rock Hard

seasons.details: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.
seasons.title: Grey Dawn

seasons.details: Kyle diz que, como presente de aniversário, sua mãe levará ele e três amigos para a Casa Bonita. A alegria de Cartman acaba quando Kyle decide convidar Stan, Kenny e Butters. Agora Butters precisa "desaparecer".
seasons.title: Casa Bonita

seasons.details: Um novo aluno mórmon se muda à South Park, mas não se dá bem com ninguém. Os rapazes querem que Stan comece uma briga com ele, mas na verdade, ele acaba se tornando seu amigo.
seasons.title: Tudo sobre mórmons

seasons.details: Depois de receberem a visita de um grupo anti-tabagista, os rapazes começam a fumar. Ao ver a oportunidade de escapar do castigo, eles dizem aos seus pais que na verdade a culpa é das tapacarias.
seasons.title: Bunda de Fora

seasons.details: Wendy termina o seu relacionamento com Stan, e para ajudá-lo, os meninos o levam a um restaurante famoso por suas asas de frango e suas belas garçonetes. Mas o plano não funciona e Stan se une a um grupo de góticos.
seasons.title: Raisins

seasons.details: Os pais biológicos de Ike o levam ao Canadá graças a uma nova lei que aprovou o primeiro ministro e toda South Park decide dar dinheiro para eles dos presentes de Natal para que os Broflovskis se recuperem.
seasons.title: Natal no Canadá?

seasons.details: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.
seasons.title: Good Times With Weapons

seasons.details: Jimmy is in training for the upcoming Special Olympics and he's determined to win at any cost.
seasons.title: Up the Down Steroid

seasons.details: Kyle finally sees the blockbuster movie "The Passion of the Christ" and admits that Cartman has been right about the Jewish people all along.
seasons.title: The Passion of the Jew

seasons.details: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.
seasons.title: You Got F'd in the A

seasons.details: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.
seasons.title: AWESOM-O

seasons.details: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.
seasons.title: The Jeffersons

seasons.details: Humans from the year 4035 are traveling to South Park through a recently opened time portal and are looking for work.
seasons.title: Goobacks

seasons.details: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.
seasons.title: Douche and Turd

seasons.details: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.
seasons.title: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes

seasons.details: The kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge.
seasons.title: Preschool

seasons.details: Cartman, Jimmy, Kyle, Stan, Butters e Tolkien produzem suas próprias notícias matinais na estação de televisão interna da escola e ficam praticamente presos em uma intensa competição por conseguir a maior quantidade de audiência.
seasons.title: Em busca de audiência

seasons.details: Paris Hilton visita South Park para inaugurar sua loja "Tonta, puta e mimada" e, ao ver que ela é um modelo para uma enorme quantidade de garotas, Wendy se preocupa muito.
seasons.title: Kit de Vídeo da Vadia Idiota e Mimada

seasons.details: Cartman estava tentando voar, mas o máximo que conseguiu foi um golpe na cabeça e isso fez com que ele ficasse dois dias em coma. A polícia local assume que agora Cartman tem poderes psíquicos e que pode resolver casos extraordinários.
seasons.title: O incrível talento de Cartman

seasons.details: Stan se encontra com alguns lindos animaizinhos do bosque, que pedem para ele alguns favores inocentes. Após ajudar todos eles, Stan descobre que na verdade eles tem um plano para trazer o anticristo para o mundo.
seasons.title: Criaturas da Floresta

seasons.details: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too.
seasons.title: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina

seasons.details: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.
seasons.title: Die Hippie, Die

seasons.details: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.
seasons.title: Wing

seasons.details: Kenny is the only one of his friends to get the newest, coolest portable gaming device and Cartman can't deal with it. Will they remain best friends forever?
seasons.title: Best Friends Forever

seasons.details: The kids desperately want an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.
seasons.title: The Losing Edge

seasons.details: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.
seasons.title: The Death of Eric Cartman

seasons.details: The South Park Elementary School Talent Show is coming up and Jimmy can't wait to perform his comedy routine, but first he must find a way to gain control of his raging hormones.
seasons.title: Erection Day

seasons.details: A Global Warming State of Emergency is declared in South Park as the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the adjacent town of Beaverton.
seasons.title: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow

seasons.details: Butters must fake his death, dress up as a girl and infiltrate a slumber party, in order to retrieve a future telling device Cartman is convinced the girls have.
seasons.title: Marjorine

seasons.details: In an effort to thwart her ex-lovers plans to get married, Mrs. Garrison leads the charge against gay marriage.
seasons.title: Follow That Egg

seasons.details: Cartman promove o ódio na escola contra os meninos com cabelo vermelho, sardas e pele pálida, dizendo que eles não tem alma e não sobrevivem ao sol. Kyle, indignado, decide converter ele em um.
seasons.title: Crianças ruivas

seasons.details: Stan estava buscando algo "divertido e grátis" para passar o tempo e aceita fazer um teste de personalidade oferecido por uns cientologistas e descobre que o seu "nível de alma" é surpreendentemente alto.
seasons.title: Preso no armário

seasons.details: Os locutores do show da baleia Jambú fazem com que as crianças acreditem que a baleia pode falar, e que ela se chama Willzyx, que está doente e morrerá se não regressar à sua casa na lua. Agora os meninos querem levar a baleia para a lua.
seasons.title: Libertem Willzyx

seasons.details: Randy está tendo problemas com bebida e é obrigado a ir em um grupo de Alcoólicos Anônimos, onde acaba sendo convencido que está doente e para poder deixar de beber precisa de um milagre.
seasons.title: Bloody Mary

seasons.details: Chef returns to South Park after spending time away with a group called, "The Super Adventure Club," but when his strange behavior starts getting him in trouble, the boys risk everything to save him.
seasons.title: The Return of Chef

seasons.details: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.
seasons.title: Smug Alert!

seasons.details: Cartman and Kyle are at war over the popular cartoon "Family Guy."
seasons.title: Cartoon Wars Part I

seasons.details: After leaving Kyle injured on the side of the road, Cartman races to the headquarters of "Family Guy" determined to put an end to the show once and for all.
seasons.title: Cartoon Wars Part II

seasons.details: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.
seasons.title: A Million Little Fibers

seasons.details: Al Gore warns the school about the threat of Manbearpig.
seasons.title: Manbearpig

seasons.details: When Cartman's mom realizes she can't control her son anymore, she gets help from an expert. The "Dog Whisperer" may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.
seasons.title: Tsst

seasons.details: The boys dedicate their lives to defeating a mad gamer and saving the World of Warcraft.
seasons.title: Make Love, Not Warcraft

seasons.details: The world's biggest conspiracy of all time is finally uncovered when Eric Cartman exposes the true culprit behind the September 11th attacks.
seasons.title: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce

seasons.details: In his new role as School Hallway Monitor at South Park Elementary, Cartman must team up with Kyle when they discover a teacher having sex with a student.
seasons.title: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy

seasons.details: Satanás está organizando a maior festa de Halloween e ninguém pode entrar sem sua pulseira azul. Porém, as travessuras dos assassinos seriais mais notáveis de todos os tempos acabam arruinando tudo.
seasons.title: Inferno na Terra 2006

seasons.details: O senhor Garrison precisa explicar a Teoria da Evolução em aula, mesmo que isso vá totalmente contra os seus valores. Enquanto isso, Cartman mal pode esperar o dia em que lançam o seu novo videogame preferido.
seasons.title: Vai, Deus, vai XII

seasons.details: Cartman resolve congelar a si mesmo em uma tentativa desesperada de suportar a espera do lançamento do novo Nintendo Wii. Ele acaba despertando apenas 500 anos mais tarde, em um futuro nada agradável, e o pior de tudo: sem Nintendo Wii!
seasons.title: Vamos Deus, vamos XII

seasons.details: Agora Stan é o novo treinador de um time de hockey infantil e tenta fazer com que eles ganhem tudo. Enquanto isso, seu pai precisa lidar com a recordação do terrível desempenho de Stan em uma partida há alguns anos atrás.
seasons.title: A Copa de Stanley

seasons.details: After Randy Marsh experiences an unfortunate incident on national TV, the "N" bomb hits South Park.  While Randy seeks forgiveness from Jesse Jackson, South Park Elementary invites a midget by the name of Dr. Nelson to talk about sensitivity.
seasons.title: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson

seasons.details: When his "ultimate plan" to embarrass Butters backfires, Cartman struggles to keep his classmates from seeing a compromising photograph. Meanwhile, Butters is sent to a special camp where they "Pray the Gay Away."
seasons.title: Cartman Sucks

seasons.details: An infestation of head lice plagues South Park Elementary. When Mr. Garrison refuses to name names, Cartman finds a way to detect who has lice in the hopes of making fun of his unfortunate classmate.
seasons.title: Lice Capades

seasons.details: While Cartman follows a lead on a possible terrorist attack, Hillary Clinton makes a campaign stop in South Park for a big rally.
seasons.title: The Snuke

seasons.details: Determined to get the real story behind why he has to decorate eggs for Easter, Stan falls in with an eccentric society that guards a legendary secret.
seasons.title: Fantastic Easter Special

seasons.details: Ms. Garrison gets dumped again and takes her frustration out on the fourth grade class. However, things start looking up for her when she meets a new friend at the gym and they go out for drink at a local "girl bar."
seasons.title: D-Yikes!

seasons.details: As an increasing number of homeless people are begging for change all over South Park, the boys work to solve the homeless problem once and for all.
seasons.title: Night of the Living Homeless

seasons.details: Cartman's Tourette's is making school even more tedious for Kyle.
seasons.title: Le Petit Tourette

seasons.details: Stan's dad becomes South Park's home-town hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap.
seasons.title: More Crap

seasons.details: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.
seasons.title: Imaginationland

seasons.details: Stan e Kyle se tornam prisioneiros do Pentágono até contarem exatamente como chegaram à Terra da Imaginação. Cartman não desistirá da aposta e quer que Kyle chupe suas bolas, conforme o combinado.
seasons.title: Terra da Imaginação: Episódio II

seasons.details: Quando estão na Terra da Imaginação, Stan e Butters tem que lutar contra um exército de forças imaginárias do mal. A Suprema Corte declara que as criaturas imaginárias não são reais e planeja destruir a Terra da Imaginação.
seasons.title: Terra da Imaginação: Episódio III

seasons.details: Stan e Kyle se tornam obcecados pelo Guitar Hero, chegando ao ponto de baterem recordes. Depois de um tempo Stan pensa que poderia ir mais longe na carreira com um parceiro diferente.
seasons.title: "Guitar Viado"

seasons.details: As meninas do quarto ano fizeram uma lista secreta que dá nota a todos os garotos, do mais bonito ao mais feio. Os garotos roubam a lista e os resultados não são o que eles esperavam.
seasons.title: A lista

seasons.details: Cartman finds himself fighting for his life after a routine tonsillectomy goes wrong. When Kyle becomes infected with Cartman's ailment, the two won't stop for anything as they search for a cure that will reverse their otherwise certain mortality.
seasons.title: Tonsil Trouble

seasons.details: When the boys help Britney Spears get to the North Pole, they discover the shocking secret behind her popularity.
seasons.title: Britney's New Look

seasons.details: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, "Heavy Metal", the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.
seasons.title: Major Boobage

seasons.details: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.
seasons.title: Canada On Strike

seasons.details: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.
seasons.title: Eek, A Penis!

seasons.details: The citizens of South Park wake up and find the internet is gone. When Randy hears there may still be some internet out in California, he packs up his family and heads west.
seasons.title: Over Logging

seasons.details: While the kids are on an educational field trip to a living museum, Cartman makes Butters sneak away from the class to go to the amusement center located next door.
seasons.title: Super Fun Time

seasons.details: With the rest of the American people haunted by the memory of a recent tragic event, only Butters will stand with Cartman as he confronts the Chinese.
seasons.title: The China Probrem

seasons.details: Wendy gets in trouble when she threatens to beat up Cartman after school.
seasons.title: Breast Cancer Show Ever

seasons.details: While the world struggles to contain an epidemic of epic proportions, the boys find a way to make money off of it.
seasons.title: Pandemic

seasons.details: As cidades estão sofrendo com uma enorme invasão de Porquinhos-da-índia gigantes e apenas os rapazes tem a chave que poderá salvar todos do ataque! Entretanto, eles estão presos na Cordilheira dos Andes.
seasons.title: Pandemia 2: espantosos

seasons.details: Os moradores de South Park comemoram nas ruas, depois da eleição de um novo presidente. Enquanto a população está comemorando, o presidente eleito chega, repentinamente, à Casa Branca e logo dá início ao seu grande plano.
seasons.title: Sobre ontem à noite

seasons.details: Um novo garoto chega à cidade e lança uma nova moda. Os garotos não querem aderir, mas percebem que vão perder sua popularidade, se não entrarem na onda.
seasons.title: Musical da Escola Fundamental

seasons.details: Butters vê vampiros na escola, mas ninguém acredita nele. Ele acha que seria mais feliz sendo um vampiro. Mas de qualquer maneira, a garotada não percebe a diferença entre góticos e vampiros.
seasons.title: O "incastigável"

seasons.details: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.
seasons.title: The Ring

seasons.details: "The Coon" rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park.
seasons.title: The Coon

seasons.details: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy.
seasons.title: Margaritaville

seasons.details: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well.
seasons.title: Eat, Pray, Queef

seasons.details: Cartman and Jimmy come up with the funniest joke of all time.
seasons.title: Fishsticks

seasons.details: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby.
seasons.title: Pinewood Derby

seasons.details: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia.
seasons.title: Fatbeard

seasons.details: Ike is being tormented by paranormal forces. Kyle brings in professional ghost hunters to help save his little brother.
seasons.title: Dead Celebrities

seasons.details: Butters is determined to get his first kiss so his friends won't make fun of him anymore.
seasons.title: Butters' Bottom Bitch

seasons.details: After attending their first WWE match, all the boys want to be professional wrestlers.
seasons.title: W.T.F.

seasons.details: Stan se mobiliza para impedir que os japoneses matem todas as baleias e os golfinhos do mundo.
seasons.title: Prostituta de baleias

seasons.details: A galerinha de South Park luta contra os motociclistas barulhentos e detestáveis que andam perturbando a tranquilidade dos moradores da cidade.
seasons.title: A palavra com "V"

seasons.details: Cartman é escolhido para fazer os anúncios da manhã na escola de South Park.
seasons.title: Danças com Smurfs

seasons.details: O dia de diversão dos garotos no parque aquático está prestes a acabar mal... muito mal.
seasons.title: Parque de diversões

seasons.details: The latest in scientific testing reveals that some of the boys at South Park Elementary have a sex addiction problem.
seasons.title: Sexual Healing

seasons.details: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own.
seasons.title: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs

seasons.details: Cartman's favorite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.
seasons.title: Medicinal Fried Chicken

seasons.details: When Kyle begs Stan to "friend" him, Stan gets sucked into Facebook.
seasons.title: You Have 0 Friends

seasons.details: The town of South Park faces a class action lawsuit as every celebrity they've ever ridiculed is out for revenge.
Angry celebrities, violent ginger kids and Mecha Streisand are about to destroy South Park and all anyone wants to know is, "Who is Eric Cartman's father?"
Jimmy and Timmy are off to summer camp with all their handicapable friends.
seasons.title: Crippled Summer

seasons.details: Cartman dreams of being a NASCAR driver and he's willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen.
seasons.title: Poor and Stupid

seasons.details: New Jersey is taking over the nation one state at a time. Randy and the boys take a stand as the Jerseyites approach South Park.
seasons.title: It's A Jersey Thing

seasons.details: When Stan is sent to the school counselor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.
seasons.title: Insheeption

seasons.details: Coon e seus amigos decidem ajudar as vítimas do mais recente acidente de perfuração da BP, no Golfo. Para desânimo de Coon, outro super-herói chega lá primeiro.
seasons.title: Hindsight

seasons.details: A verdadeira identidade de Mysterion finalmente é revelada. Enquanto isso, Guaxinim, desprezado por seus amigos super-heróis, está com sede de vingança.
seasons.title: Nasce Mysterion

seasons.details: Guaxinim e amigos se encontram à mercê de Cartman, que agora tem o senhor das trevas, Cthulhu, trabalhando para ele. Kenny luta contra a maldição dos seus superpoderes através do seu alter ego, Mysterion.
seasons.title: Coon versus Coon e amigos

seasons.details: A vida de Stan está um verdadeiro desastre, tanto em casa quanto na escola. Enquanto isso, a obsessão de Randy com a comida está mudando tudo, e inclusive faz com que Sharon descubra novos interesses.
seasons.title: Crème Fraiche

seasons.details: Kyle is intimately involved in the development of a revolutionary new product called HumancentiPad.
seasons.title: HUMANCENTiPAD

seasons.details: Jimmy hosts the Special Ed Department's First Annual Comedy Awards.
seasons.title: Funnybot

seasons.details: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.
seasons.title: Royal Pudding

seasons.details: Cartman throws a fit when the boys' penis sizes are posted on the school bulletin board, and is sent to anger management therapy.
seasons.title: T.M.I.

seasons.details: Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman's latest business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.
seasons.title: Crack Baby Athletic Association

seasons.details: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder.
seasons.title: City Sushi

seasons.details: Just after Stan's 10th birthday, his worldview starts to change and so do his friendships.
seasons.title: You're Getting Old

seasons.details: Cartman finds a unique way to cope with Asperger's Syndrome.
seasons.title: Ass Burgers

seasons.details: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.
seasons.title: The Last of the Meheecans

seasons.details: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.
seasons.title: Bass to Mouth

seasons.details: Depois de levar Sharon para assistir um musical, Randy se entusiasma e se torna o maior fã da Broodway.
seasons.title: Broadway

seasons.details: Noventa e nove por cento dos alunos estão contra Eric Cartman.
Os garotos estão próximos de descobrir a verdade sobre o primeiro Dia de Ação de Graças da história dos Estados Unidos.
seasons.title: Dia de Ação de Graças no History Channel

seasons.details: Kenny entra para o sistema de adoção depois que seus pais são presos.
seasons.title: Pobre Garoto

seasons.details: When one of the boys leaves the toilet seat up after he uses the bathroom, an unspeakable tragedy occurs.
seasons.title: Reverse Cowgirl

seasons.details: Cartman launches his own gem shopping channel.
seasons.title: Cash For Gold

seasons.details: The kids are in danger when new trends start to evolve and shift at a rapid pace.
seasons.title: Faith Hilling

seasons.details: The town's big Easter Egg Hunt is in jeopardy when Cartman produces video evidence of a mysterious creature lurking in the woods.
seasons.title: Jewpacabra

seasons.details: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.
seasons.title: Butterballs

seasons.details: The boys' ziplining adventure becomes a terrifying test of survival.
seasons.title: I Should Have Never Gone Ziplining

seasons.details: The time has finally come for Cartman to let a special someone know exactly how he feels.
seasons.title: Cartman Finds Love

seasons.details: South Park Elementary takes steps to address football's concussion crisis.
seasons.title: Sarcastaball

seasons.details: Cartman finally admits he's fat and immediately gets a mobility scooter.
seasons.title: Raising The Bar

seasons.details: Cartman signs up for a home security system.
seasons.title: Insecurity

seasons.details: É hora de Butters começar uma jornada onde seguirá os passos de seus ancestrais Havaianos.
seasons.title: Tornando-se nativo

seasons.details: Os grandes planos de Randy para a noite de Halloween impede Stan de sair para brincar de doce ou travessuras com seus amigos.
seasons.title: Um pesadelo no FaceTime

seasons.details: O mundo está abalado pela recente notícia do uso de drogas por um ícone amado, e todos estão se sentindo perdidos e traídos.
seasons.title: Uma desculpa para aplaudir

seasons.details: Obama volta a ganhar as eleições presidenciais, e tudo indica que ele contou com a ajuda do governo chinês e de Cartman.
seasons.title: Obama vence

seasons.details: Cartman infiltrates the NSA and doesn't like what he finds in his personal file.
seasons.title: Let Go, Let Gov

seasons.details: The boys use the game of "Minecraft" as a distraction tokeep their parents from hurting each other.
seasons.title: Informative Murder Porn

seasons.details: Cartman sees Tolkien as a threat to all humanity.
seasons.title: World War Zimmerman

seasons.details: The Goth kids are being sent away to a camp for troubled children.
seasons.title: Goth Kids 3: Dawn of the Posers

seasons.details: When Ike hits puberty, he and Kyle start to grow apart.  To save their relationship, Kyle takes Ike to see a live performance of Yo Gabba Gabba.
seasons.title: Taming Strange

seasons.details: Cartman's latest prank brings peace to the world.
seasons.title: Ginger Cow

seasons.details: The boys prepare to battle the crowds already lining up for the first official day of holiday shopping.
seasons.title: Black Friday

seasons.details: Black Friday is almost here and the battle for the new gaming devices is heating up.  Princess Kenny's betrayal has left Cartman out for revenge.
seasons.title: A Song of Ass and Fire

seasons.details: The doors to the mall will finally open for the biggest Black Friday sale in history. The boys are divided over which gaming device to buy and a bloody battle will determine whether Xbox or Sony will be the winner.
seasons.title: Titties and Dragons

seasons.details: When Wendy tries to fix one of her girlfriends up with Butters, she ends up in the counselor's office.
seasons.title: The Hobbit

seasons.details: The boys name their new start-up company, The Washington Redskins.
seasons.title: Go Fund Yourself

seasons.details: South Park goes gluten free.
seasons.title: Gluten Free Ebola

seasons.details: Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him.  Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.
seasons.title: The Cissy

seasons.details: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.
seasons.title: Handicar

seasons.details: Graphic video from an unknown drone is uploaded on the internet.
seasons.title: The Magic Bush

seasons.details: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.
seasons.title: Freemium Isn't Free

seasons.details: Butters is convinced he's living in a virtual reality.
seasons.title: Grounded Vindaloop

seasons.details: There are illegal goings-on in the basement of City Wok.
seasons.title: Cock Magic

seasons.details: Kyle just wants to play video games with his little brother.  But, when Ike doesn't want to play with him anymore, Kyle is afraid that the next generation is passing him by.
seasons.title: #REHASH

seasons.details: Cartmaan Bra is trending as the country prepares to watch the biggest Holiday Spectacular ever.
seasons.title: #HappyHolograms

seasons.details: The boys express their utmost respect for Caitlyn Jenner in the most stunning and brave South Park ever.
seasons.title: Stunning and Brave

seasons.details: Garrison wants to build a wall to keep out all of the undocumented immigrants.
seasons.title: Where My Country Gone?

seasons.details: The town of South Park is gentrifying and Kenny thinks it's time to get a job.
seasons.title: The City Part of Town

seasons.details: Cartman considers himself the top on-line restaurant reviewer in South Park.
seasons.title: You're Not Yelping

seasons.details: Cartman is the latest victim of body shaming.
seasons.title: Safe Space

seasons.details: The Asian girls in school are drawing dreamy pictures of Tweek and Craig.
seasons.title: Tweek x Craig

seasons.details: The citizens of South Park decide they no longer need a police force in town.
seasons.title: Naughty Ninjas

seasons.details: Jimmy's integrity as a newsman runs smack into PC Principal's ideology.
seasons.title: Sponsored Content

seasons.details: PC Principal disappears with two of the 4th grade students.
seasons.title: Truth and Advertising

seasons.details: Kyle has chosen a dangerous alliance over his friendship with Stan.
seasons.title: PC Principal Final Justice

seasons.details: Garrison is still hot on the campaign trail.
seasons.title: Member Berries

seasons.details: Kyle's dad manages to keep his identity as a troll a secret while he takes his on-line abuse global.
seasons.title: Skank Hunt

seasons.details: Gerald is thrilled with the media attention as he continues to troll everyone and anyone.
seasons.title: The Damned

seasons.details: The boys band together to stand up for their rights.
seasons.title: Wieners Out

seasons.details: Giant Douche wants out of the Presidential race.
seasons.title: Douche and a Danish

seasons.details: An entire city in Colorado gets hacked.  Gerald and Cartman may lose everything when their complete history of internet activity becomes public.
seasons.title: Fort Collins

seasons.details: Gerald comes face-to-face with the Troll Hunter.
seasons.title: Oh, Jeez

seasons.details: The new President-elect pays a visit to his hometown.
seasons.title: Members Only

seasons.details: Cartman is certain that Butters is trying to steal his girlfriend.
seasons.title: Not Funny

seasons.details: Cartman finally understands why Heidi wants to get him to Mars.
seasons.title: The End of Serialization As We Know It

seasons.details: Protestors armed with tiki torches and confederate flags take to the streets of South Park. Randy comes to grips with what it means to be white in today's society.
seasons.title: White People Renovating Houses

seasons.details: When Tweek is caught in the middle of a petty conflict, it drives his relationship with Craig to the brink.
seasons.title: Put It Down

seasons.details: In a return to form, a forbidden love story between a white man and a Native American man unfolds. However, the boys' story exploits people's misery for laughs. 4 ½ out of 5 stars. A-
seasons.title: Holiday Special

seasons.details: Professor Chaos has found the perfect tool to spread lies and misinformation about Coon and Friends. In trying to save their reputation, the boys come face to face with Mark Zuckerberg.
seasons.title: Franchise Prequel

seasons.details: Drugs are flowing into South Park. A passionate young health advocate has traced the source of these illegal meds and is about to expose Stan Marsh.
seasons.title: Hummels & Heroin

seasons.details: This year at the traditional Halloween get together, a witch casts a spell that terrorizes the town and ruins Halloween for the boys. Cartman sees a way to use the witch's power to his advantage.
seasons.title: Sons a Witches

seasons.details: Kyle doesn't understand why Heidi won't break up with Cartman. He's playing with fire when he gets in the middle of the school's most talked about couple.
seasons.title: Doubling Down

seasons.details: Jimmy and Timmy's project has caught the attention of some very important people. Their experiment could have far reaching implications that could save the world… and they might even win first prize in this year's science fair.
seasons.title: Moss Piglets

seasons.details: PC Principal is wrestling with some unfamiliar feelings. Meanwhile, boys will be boys except for Kyle who, for the first time, seems to see things differently from the rest of his friends.
seasons.title: SUPER HARD PCness

seasons.details: The children of South Park claim to have seen Mr. Garrison lurking around town and they're frightened. The town comes together to make the President go away.
seasons.title: Splatty Tomato

seasons.details: Sharon is abnormally emotional and it's really getting Randy down.
seasons.title: Dead Kids

seasons.details: A Boy and a Priest - The town finds the church doors locked and there's no sign of Butters or the Pastor.
seasons.title: A Boy and a Priest

seasons.details: The Problem with a Poo - Mr. Hankey's offensive behavior puts him in jeopardy of being fired as the Director of the Annual Christmas Pageant.
seasons.title: The Problem with a Poo

seasons.details: Tegridy Farms - Randy moves the family to the country and he takes up farming.
seasons.title: Tegridy Farms

seasons.details: The Scoots - The kids plan to use the latest revolution in mobility to get more candy on Halloween than they have ever gotten before.
seasons.title: The Scoots

seasons.details: Time to Get Cereal - South Park Citizens are in danger and the boys realize that only Al Gore can help.
seasons.title: Time to Get Cereal

seasons.details: Nobody Got Cereal? - The boys break out of jail and are on the run from the police and ManBearPig.
seasons.title: Nobody Got Cereal?

seasons.details: Buddha Box - Cartman has been diagnosed with anxiety.
seasons.title: Buddha Box

seasons.details: Unfulfilled - South Park is chosen to be the home for Amazon's newest Fulfillment Center.
seasons.title: Unfulfilled

seasons.details: Bike Parade - The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.
seasons.title: Bike Parade

seasons.details: Randy fights against home-grown. Meanwhile, Kyle goes to camp.
seasons.title: Mexican Joker

seasons.details: Randy sees an opportunity for Tegridy in China.
seasons.title: Band in China

seasons.details: Randy celebrates the success of Tegridy Farms while Cartman refuses to get a shot.
seasons.title: SHOTS!!!

seasons.details: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.
seasons.title: Let Them Eat Goo

seasons.details: It's Halloween and Randy is dealing with his daughter's marijuana problem.
seasons.title: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special

seasons.details: The citizens of South Park have had enough of Randy and Tegridy Farms and they just want to lock him up.
seasons.title: Season Finale

seasons.details: The annual Strong Woman competition pushes everyone to their limits.
seasons.title: Board Girls

seasons.details: Kyle's mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.
seasons.title: Turd Burglars

seasons.details: Scott Malkinson's desperate to impress the new girl in his class.
seasons.title: Basic Cable

seasons.details: Santa is stealing all the joy from the town's Holiday Season.
seasons.title: Christmas Snow

seasons.details: With the school on lock-down, Butters flips out knowing that things may never go back to normal.
seasons.title: The Pandemic Special

seasons.details: The citizens of South ParQ are clamoring for the COVID-19 vaccine. A hilarious new militant group tries to stop the boys from getting their teacher vaccinated.
seasons.title: South ParQ Vaccination Special

seasons.details: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pajama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class. Cartman is distraught. The kids aren't going to stand for it but PC Principal refuses to back down.
seasons.title: Pajama day
